narrative:
Union Township F (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,144 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.9 percentage points.
